value.title: Global deaths per energy source - Statista
value.content: * Premium Statistic Greenhouse gas emissions from secondary energy sources in Canada 2020. * Premium Statistic Distribution of energy-related CO2 emissions in Africa 2018, by sector. * Premium Statistic CO2 emissions related to energy combustion in France 1990-2023. * Premium Statistic Global energy demand by sector 2017-2040. * Basic Statistic Energy-related carbon dioxide emissions in Turkey 1990-2022, by energy source. * Basic Statistic Energy-related carbon dioxide emissions in the U.S. 2024-2050, by end-use. * Premium Statistic Energy-related CO2 emissions from households Germany 1990-2023. * Premium Statistic Energy-related CO₂ emissions per capita in the U.S. 2022, by state. * Premium Statistic Secondary energy use in Canada by source 2017. "Mortality Rate from Accidents and Air Pollution per Unit of Electricity Worldwide, by Energy Source (in Deaths per Terawatt-hour)." Statista, Statista Inc., 7 Feb 2022, https://www.statista.com/statistics/494425/death-rate-worldwide-by-energy-source/?\_\_sso\_cookie\_checker=failed. Canary Media, Mortality rate from accidents and air pollution per unit of electricity worldwide, by energy source (in deaths per terawatt-hour) Statista, https://www.statista.com/statistics/494425/death-rate-worldwide-by-energy-source/?\_\_sso\_cookie\_checker=failed (last visited March 20, 2026).
